summary: The test suite is comprehensive and maps directly to all stated requirements: artifact creation, all three retention policies (age, size, keep-latest-N), combined policy union, dry-run mode, formatted output, error handling, and an end-to-end integration scenario. Boundary conditions are handled thoughtfully — the exact-cutoff boundary test for age, zero-budget size test, and KeepN exceeding artifact count are all present. The integration test with inline math commentary is particularly valuable for verifying union semantics across all three policies simultaneously. Design is clean: BeforeAll fixtures are scoped correctly with $script:, Describe blocks map one-to-one with functional units, and test names are self-documenting. Minor gaps prevent a perfect score: (1) no test for an empty artifact array, which is a common real-world edge case; (2) the implementation indexes deletions by artifact Name (HashSet<string>), creating a silent bug if two artifacts share a name across different workflows — the test suite never exercises this; (3) negative or zero MaxAgeDays/KeepLatestPerWorkflow validation at the parameter level is untested; (4) floating-point precision in size calculations is unchecked beyond the basic cases. Overall this is a well-designed, trust-worthy suite that would catch the vast majority of regressions.
